name: Shrine of the First Harvest
description: At the center of this quiet chamber stands a simple stone altar adorned with carved sheaves of grain and
clusters of unfamiliar fungi. There are no weapons, no kings, and no monuments to conquest—only scenes of planting,
harvest, and shared meals. Whatever gods the dwarves honored, they thanked them first for abundance.
Even after all these centuries, the room feels peaceful.TODO: AI Text
